last_safe_checkpoint.description: Completed the evaluator/rules implementation, repaired the install-script regression, and passed the full pytest suite.

bootstrap.goal: Implement the evaluator checkpoint architecture and package runtime rule contracts under agents/rules.

task_sync.resume_checkpoint: Implementation and full validation are complete. Resume only if the user wants commit preparation or additional hardening beyond this evaluator/rules scope.

items.text: Phase 1. Review the current evaluator, supervisor, and goals-scheduler roles and confirm the approved checkpoint architecture
Phase 2. Move one-shot runtime stage contracts into `agents/rules/` and mirror them into packaged assets
Phase 3. Implement the mandatory post-plan evaluator checkpoint and keep the goals-only post-commit evaluator aligned with the rules-based contract
Phase 4. Run the full repository test suite, fix regressions, and leave `.dev` state synchronized with the completed work

next_action: Await user direction for commit preparation or any additional hardening beyond the completed evaluator/rules implementation.
notes: Mandatory post-plan evaluator checkpoint remains semantic and is now backed by rules loaded from agents/rules with packaged fallback.
Final evaluator remains mandatory only for goals-scheduler prompts after commit.
Source and packaged rule assets are synchronized under agents/rules and backend/dormammu/assets/agents/rules.
Full repository validation passed: python3 -m pytest -> 627 passed in 68.25s.
No commit was created in this pass.
